programs.title: Inside Out
programs.desc: Mike and Carmine struggle to balance Katie and Michael's big goals for their home's interior and exterior.

programs.title: Building Outside The Lines
programs.desc: When a big beekeeping family request a stylish oasis, Cappie and Alex transform a truck's concrete mixer into the ultimate 'Beehive Bungalow.'.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: A potentially bad buy will need a lot of work to clear up known issues, but the exploding market could make the flip worth the risk.

programs.title: Hot Mess House
programs.desc: Cas and Wendell help a couple whose home has become a giant playroom for their kids and another family drowning in clothes and books.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: A couple leaves Detroit to provide their three boys with a new perspective on life in Iceland.

programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.desc: David helps a couple find a dream retirement home on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.
